data.requirement: Join soil_analysis_data with crop_production_data on District to enable cross-table analysis of soil properties and yield metrics.
data.reason: Original requirement lacked explicit join logic needed to analyze soil-yield relationships between tables

data.requirement: Calculate yield variation coefficients per soil type rather than z-scores for nutrient-yield correlations
data.reason: Z-score calculation assumes normal distribution and requires full dataset joins not yet established

visualization.requirement: Enhanced scatter matrix showing nutrient vs yield relationships with color encoding for Soil Type instead of small multiples
visualization.reason: Original 8-facet small multiples would become unreadable given 23 crops and 10 districts

visualization.requirement: Choropleth map showing district-level soil fertility indices derived from nutrients, paired with bar charts for top-yield crops
visualization.reason: Spatial heatmap matrix would misrepresent geographic relationships in non-grid district layout

interaction.requirement: Replace lasso selection with rectangular brush selection in scatter plots for cross-filtering
interaction.reason: Vega-Lite doesn't support lasso selection natively, only rectangular brushing
